scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,blue "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
